scripts.allure:generate: powershell -Command "$latest = (Get-ChildItem -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'allure-results-*' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1).Name; allure generate $latest -o allure-report-$latest --clean"
scripts.allure:open: powershell -Command "$latest = (Get-ChildItem -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -like 'allure-report-*' } | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 1).Name; allure open $latest"
